defs: to dry (clothes, grain etc) in the sun
(fig.) to expose and share (one's experiences and thoughts) on the Web (loanword from "share")
(coll.) to give the cold shoulder to
to be in the sun (getting warm or sunbathing etc)
to put sth in the sun (e.g. to dry it)
(coll.) to indiscriminately share news, images etc of one's child on social media; sharenting
person who shares their experiences and thoughts with others on the Internet
(Malaysia) thick soy sauce (used to give food a glossy, caramel-like color)
(Internet slang) to post a photo of oneself online
see also 木糖醇[mu4 tang2 chun2]
to expose unfair practices (on a consumer protection website)
